MIT Media Lab KEMAR HRTF measurements

Authors: Bill Gardner and Keith Martin
Source: https://sound.media.mit.edu/resources/KEMAR/
Embedded data: compact.zip, elevation 0 degrees, azimuth 30 degrees, 44.1 kHz HRIR

Copyright 1994 by the MIT Media Laboratory.

The upstream archive states:

"It is provided free with no restrictions on use, provided the authors are cited when the data
is used in any research or commercial application."

GXPlayer embeds the left and right 128-sample impulse responses as signed PCM constants and
resamples them during DSP-chain construction.
